channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Driverless 'bus of the future' is tested in Barcelona
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Commuters in downtown Barcelona have been able to ride the bus for free this week. There’s just one catch: this mini-bus has no one at the wheel.
item.dc:creator: HERNAN MUÑOZ and JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Vance hopeful 'high-level' TikTok deal will be completed by early April
item.description: Vice President JD Vance said Friday that he was hopeful a deal to keep TikTok operating in the U.S. will be wrapped up by the early April deadline.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Block Party offers tool for optimizing social media privacy
item.description: If optimizing your social media privacy settings feels important but overwhelming, a company called Block Party may be able to help. Founder and CEO Tracy Chou has long been known for advocating for diversity in the tech industry.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Stupendous Python stunts without a net
item.description: In this week’s Python Report: Sly tricks for setting up Python on a machine with no network, snappier Python code with asyncand await, swifter Python programs with Zig, and slicker web apps with HTMX and Django.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Inclusive Workplaces: Breaking Down Barriers for People with Disabilities
item.description: As technology advances, workplaces can become more inclusive by implementing accessibility features and training staff to tap into a newly empowered pool of workers.
item.dc:creator: CalMatters, The Mercury News

item.title: Oracle could still end up running TikTok
item.description: TikTok is just weeks away from shutting operations in the US, unless it reaches a deal - and Oracle could be in pole position.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Google is finally rolling out a fix for broken Chromecasts – just as new bugs appear on the Chromecast with Google TV
item.description: A fix is on the way for the 2nd-gen Chromecast and Chromecast Audio, but new issues are being reported.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: CAIOs are stepping out from the CIO’s shadow
item.description: In 2016, Andrew Ng, one of the best-known researchers in the field of AI, wrote about the benefits of establishing a chief AI officer role in companies, as well as the characteristics and responsibilities such a role should have.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Why DeepSeek’s arrival looks like a key moment for safe AI
item.description: The AI industry is growing up fast. New model releases are now a regular event and premium AI features are quickly overtaken by free or freemium alternatives.
item.dc:creator: Donnchadh Casey, Fast Company

item.title: StudentAid.gov website went down, following mass layoffs at Department of Education
item.description: An hourslong outage Wednesday on StudentAid.gov, the federal website for student loans and financial aid, underscored the risks in rapidly gutting the Department of Education, as President Donald Trump aims to dismantle the agency.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Watchdog requests probe into FAA business with Musk's Starlink
item.description: A watchdog group has asked the Transportation Department’s inspector general to investigate whether the Federal Aviation Administration’s (FAA) business with Elon Musk’s Starlink violates conflict of interest laws.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Greece says ambitious Mediterranean power cable project is on track despite setbacks
item.description: ATHENS, Greece (AP) — The future of an ambitious electricity cable linking the power grids of Greece, Cyprus and Israel by the end of the decade is on track despite a series of setbacks, Greece’s Foreign Minister Giorgos Gerapetritis said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Cisco’s chief product officer explains the company’s transformation around AI
item.description: For 40 years, Cisco has been best known for building routers, switches, and other networking technology that connects computers within offices, data centers, and across the internet.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Meta to start testing crowd-sourced fact-checking, based on X example, next week
item.description: Facebook and Instagram parent company Meta Platforms Inc. said Thursday it will begin testing its crowd-sourced fact-checking program, Community Notes, on March 18. It will initially based on a ratings system used by Elon Musk's X. Meta ended its fact-checking program in January.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Tech workers in Kenya hold vigil for TikTok content moderator who died
item.description: Technology workers in Kenya have held a vigil for a colleague who died in unclear circumstances after she was unable to travel to her home in Nigeria for two years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Laser-wielding robots are redefining farming
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New tools from OpenAI help companies create their own AI agents
item.description: OpenAI on Tuesday launched Responses, a new api intended to eventually replace Assistants. The big draw? Responses provides a number of new tools that companies and organizations can use to create their own AI agents.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to deliver more secure capabilities to the warfighter, faster
item.description: Rethinking the delivery process for new capabilities is essential to put cybersecurity and the warfighter front and center. The post How to deliver more secure capabilities to the warfighter, faster first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network
